auth.forgotDesc: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.
auth.checkEmailDesc: We've sent a password reset link to
auth.registerDesc: Set up your own isolated bot workspace.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Check your email for a confirmation link, then come back to sign in. Your dashboard will be ready and waiting.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. Redirecting you to login...
auth.setNewPasswordDesc: Your new password must be different from previous ones.
overview.title: System Overview
overview.desc: Real-time performance metrics and bot health.
knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.desc: Manage the training data and RAG retrieval sources.
knowledge.uploadDesc: Drag & drop PDF, TXT, or DOCX
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this source and its vector data?
knowledge.ragDesc: After uploading files, you must trigger the indexing process to update the Supabase vector database.
knowledge.statusUploadSuccess: File uploaded successfully! Ready to index.
knowledge.statusIndexSuccess: Indexing started in background. Refresh in a moment.
faq.title: FAQ Setup
faq.desc: Manage custom keyword-based answers for immediate priority.
faq.question: Optional Question
faq.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this FAQ?
handoff.title: Human Handoffs
handoff.desc: Manage situations where the AI requires human intervention.
handoff.emptyDesc: No users currently waiting for human help.
handoff.logicDesc: The bot automatically escalates to a human agent when user intent indicates frustration or explicit request for staff.
handoff.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this handoff?
media.title: Media Library
media.desc: Upload images and files to embed in your AI instructions or FAQs.
media.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your AI bot configuration and deployment settings.
settings.deleteWorkspaceDesc: Once you delete a workspace, there is no going back. Please be certain. All bots, flows, logs, and knowledge base files will be permanently erased.
settings.aiPersonalityDesc: Customize how your bot talks to customers.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
flows.title: Conversation Flows
flows.desc: Build automated conversation flows with custom triggers
flows.empty: No flows yet. Create your first conversation flow!
overview.configureSettings: Configure API keys and bot personality.
knowledge.dragDrop: Drag & drop files here, or click to select
knowledge.noDocuments: No documents yet. Upload one to get started.
team.inviteAlert: Email invitation requires Supabase Admin API setup. Coming soon!
workspace.createSubtitle: Launch a new chatbot project in seconds with industry-specific templates.
workspace.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
template.admissionsDesc: Perfect for schools, universities, and training centers.
template.ecommerceDesc: Optimized for product catalogs, pricing, and orders.
template.supportDesc: Focus on FAQs, troubleshooting, and handoffs.
template.bookingDesc: Ideal for spas, clinics, and service providers.
template.blankDesc: Start from scratch with a clean, generic bot.

settings.pageIdHint: Find this in Meta Business Suite > Settings > Page Info
settings.pageAccessTokenHint: Generated in Facebook Developer App > Messenger > Settings
settings.verifyTokenHint: Use this when configuring the Webhook URL in Facebook Developer portal
settings.appSecretHint: Found in Settings > Basic in your Facebook App
settings.modelHint: Choose the Gemini model that suits your needs (Flash for speed, Pro for reasoning)
settings.personalityHint: Customize how your bot talks and behaves. Leave empty to use default.
settings.promptPlaceholder: You are a helpful assistant for...
settings.fixErrors: Please fix the errors before saving.
settings.pageIdNumeric: Page ID must contain only numbers
settings.pageIdShort: Page ID is too short (min 10 digits)
settings.tokenRequired: Valid Page Access Token is required
settings.verifyTokenShort: Verify Token must be at least 5 chars
settings.aiIntegrationDesc: Your bot uses Google AI Studio (Gemini 1.5) for reasoning and retrieval.
settings.promptHint: Use this to set the bot's name, role, tone, and specific rules (e.g. 'Never mention competitors').
common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
common.confirmDelete: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete this workspace?

auth.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
